// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Service1, global::TestNamespace.Service1>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IFirst, global::TestNamespace.Service1>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Service2, global::TestNamespace.Service2>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ISecond, global::TestNamespace.Service2>();
            services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.Service3, global::TestNamespace.Service3>();
            services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.IFirst, global::TestNamespace.Service3>();
            services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.IThird, global::TestNamespace.Service3>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
